from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, TimestampType
from pyspark.sql import functions as F

schema = StructType([
    StructField("caseReference", StringType(), False),  
    StructField("currentGroup", StringType(), False),   
    StructField("asOfTimestamp", TimestampType(), False)
])

empty_df = spark.createDataFrame([], schema)

try:

	# Resolve storage path of the target table
	df_table_path = spark.sql(f"DESCRIBE EXTENDED {table_name}")
	table_path = (
		df_table_path
		.where("col_name == 'Location'")
		.select("data_type")
		.collect()[0][0]
	)
	
	spark.sql(f"USE {db_name}")
	if not spark._jsparkSession.catalog().tableExists(db_name, table_name):
		(empty_df.write \
			.format("delta") \
			.mode("overwrite") \
			.option("path", table_path) \
			.saveAsTable(f"{db_name}.{table_name}"))

except Exception as e:
	error_message = f"Error when writing the final data for {table_name}: {str(e)[:800]}"
	print(error_message)
